user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Samsung
Product type: Galaxy S25 Ultra smartphone
Tone: innovative, premium, cutting-edge
Visual style: Sleek, futuristic visuals with a focus on high-tech details and vibrant, dynamic lighting to emphasize advanced features.
Conceptual technique: technology-driven experiential storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Ultra Visionaries
brief.caption: A futuristic cityscape at night, captured in ultra-high definition by the Galaxy S25 Ultra's camera. The phone floats above the scene, its screen displaying a live feed of the vibrant lights and intricate details of the urban landscape, showcasing its cutting-edge photography capabilities.
brief.visual_style: Sleek, futuristic visuals with a focus on high-tech details and vibrant, dynamic lighting to emphasize advanced features.
brief.call_to_action: Explore the future with Galaxy S25 Ultra
brief.typography_style: Modern, ultra-thin sans-serif with a sleek and futuristic feel, subtly glowing to enhance the tech vibe.
brief.color_scheme: Galaxy-inspired deep space black, cosmic purple, and starlight silver accents
